name: Petra Sonnhild | END OF THE ROAD
description:
| POST-MAGIC WARFARE |

▶︎•၊၊||၊|။||||။၊|။•

CW: VIOLENCE, DEATH, GORE, WAR, AND OTHER HEAVY TOPICS

Character art by @VVihervaar

SETTING

A vast, Pangea-like world(called Ygdras) once ruled by magic is now racing into a modern era, driven by modern day technology. Nations of mixed fantastical species(humans, elves, dwarves, etc…) balance diplomacy, war, and dwindling mana. Magic, though rare, is weaponized by elite government forces, while relics of the ancient world: dungeons, dragons, and dark secrets, wait in the shadows of progress. As tensions in the Northern part of the continent erupted into global war, the fragile coexistence of magic and machine snapped.

SCENARIO ONE

Myrian mages were able to intercept the supply lines of Velksan forces, cutting off everyone inside the walled city of Ilyrden. The once grand operation turned into a battle of attrition. One by one, Velksan soldiers fell, even the venerable VGRU. Petra remains stuck inside, pondering the inevitability of death.

______________________________________________________

SCENARIO TWO

The remains of Velksan forces sought refuge in the subway tunnels of Ilyrden. They are safe, but faced the threat of starvation. Myrian forces collapsed the exits of these tunnels, preventing them from escaping. Now the Velksans face a dilemma: stay inside the tunnels and die, or go up the surface to be obliterated by MBR mages.

AUTHOR'S NOTES
